commands.name: index
commands.title: Claude Code Cheatsheet raz
commands.description: Browse, search, and copy Claude Code commands, options, and shortcuts to streamline your coding process.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Mighty extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Mighty Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
